mapper.sql: id, project_id, template_id, file_id, variable_name, description, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by, deleted
mapper.insert: insert into template_variable_description ( project_id, template_id, file_id, variable_name, description, created_by, updated_by, deleted ) values ( #{projectId}, #{templateId}, #{fileId}, #{variableName}, #{description}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy}, 0 )
